rulings.Case Title: YARNG ALTAWAL VS. YOEL SBERLO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 2, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs YOEL SBERLO, NADINE SBERLO, URBAN PIONEER, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Defendant admits that there is a triable issue of fact as to the first cause of action for negligence. Therefore the Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Defendants failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b) (Compare: (1) Notice of Motion "The doctrines also bar ALTAWAL's individual causes of action number two, three, four, and five;" and Separate Statement, e.g.: "Issue 1 - The first cause of action for negligence fails to state facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action against defendants.") = (501/REQ)
